--- title: "Python Engine — Jupyter" subtitle: "Scientific algorithms & publication-quality graphs" --- The **Jupyter engine** runs Python code blocks at render time and embeds the results. This page uses `numpy`, `scipy` and `matplotlib` from the dedicated `~/.venvs/quarto` environment. ## A worked example: one-compartment pharmacokinetics We model plasma concentration after an IV bolus, $C(t) = \dfrac{D}{V_d}\,e^{-k_e t}$, with $k_e = \ln 2 / t_{1/2}$. ::: {#cell-fig-pk .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import numpy as np import matplotlib.pyplot as plt dose, Vd, t_half = 1000.0, 50.0, 12.0 # mg, L, hours ke = np.log(2) / t_half t = np.linspace(0, 48, 400) C = (dose / Vd) * np.exp(-ke * t) fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 4.2)) ax.plot(t, C, color="#B71C1C", lw=2.2) ax.axhline(5, ls="--", color="grey", label="MEC (5 mg/L)") ax.fill_between(t, C, 5, where=(C > 5), alpha=0.12, color="#B71C1C") ax.set(xlabel="Time (h)", ylabel="Concentration (mg/L)", title="One-compartment IV bolus decay") ax.legend(); ax.grid(alpha=.3) plt.show() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ![Plasma concentration–time curve after a 1000 mg IV bolus.](python_files/figure-html/fig-pk-output-1.png){#fig-pk width=603 height=392} ::: ::: Figure @fig-pk is cross-referenced automatically. ## Computation: AUC by numerical integration ::: {#282056eb .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} from scipy.integrate import trapezoid auc = trapezoid(C, t) above_mec = t[C > 5][-1] print(f"AUC(0–48h) = {auc:8.1f} mg·h/L") print(f"Time above MEC = {above_mec:8.1f} h") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` AUC(0–48h) = 324.6 mg·h/L Time above MEC = 23.9 h ``` ::: ::: ## A computed table ::: {#f377530a .cell execution_count=3} ``` {.python .cell-code} import pandas as pd sample_t = [0, 6, 12, 24, 36, 48] pd.DataFrame({ "Time (h)": sample_t, "Concentration (mg/L)": [round((dose/Vd)*np.exp(-ke*x), 2) for x in sample_t], "Fraction remaining": [round(np.exp(-ke*x), 3) for x in sample_t], }) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=3} ```{=html}
Time (h) Concentration (mg/L) Fraction remaining
0 0 20.00 1.000
1 6 14.14 0.707
2 12 10.00 0.500
3 24 5.00 0.250
4 36 2.50 0.125
5 48 1.25 0.062
``` ::: :::
